Body.Content:
Currently you can create Purview Endpoint DLP policy and assign to specific users or user groups. This feature will allow you to create and assign policy based on both users and machines. You can use this feature to achieve different policies for same user on different Mac devices.

GA date: December CY2025

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Currently you can create Purview Endpoint DLP policy and assign to specific users or user groups. This feature will allow you to create and assign policy based on both users and machines. You can use this feature to achieve different policies for same user on different Mac devices.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft Purview: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention- Mac device and device group-based policy scoping support for Endpoint DLP
